title: helianthus micranthus
intro: Helianthus micranthus, also known as the smallflowered sunflower, is a plant species within the sunflower family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Helianthus micranthus include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, with properties that help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Helianthus micranthus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
